race.comment: BIG SWINGER (7) brings strong form, beating King Zephyr two back before a closing third on a tough track at Sandown last time. He's well weighted here and looks to get a nice run. HE'LL RIP (17) is building nicely having closed off well for second to ROADCONE (16) last time out at Flemington. ROADCONE actually meets HE'LL RIP better at the weights for beating him, just wonder if he wants a mile now but both have claims. COEUR VOLANTE (2) won well last time and is up to this but does have to give away a bit of weight.
